_comment: This is a template file for creating node detail configurations. Copy this file and rename it to match your node name (e.g., MyService.json)
title: Service Name
description: Brief description of what this service does

customPage._comment: Choose ONE of these customPage types

layout._comment: See _schema reference below for all component types

section_types: info - Basic information with HTML content
metrics - Key performance indicators and statistics
logs - Recent log entries or activity
customPage_types: iframe - Embed external dashboard via URL in 'content' field
html - Custom HTML content string in 'content' field
html-file - Load HTML file via 'file' field (relative to configs/details/)
components - Composable dashboard layout via 'layout' array

section.description: Container with title, padding, and shadow
section.fields: title, bg_color, text_color, border_color, className, components[]

kpi-card.description: Enhanced KPI card with trend indicator and subtitle
kpi-card.fields: key (label), value, trend ('up'|'down'|'flat'), trend_value, subtitle, icon, value_class

table.description: Data table with headers and rows
table.fields: title, columns[{header, field, align?}], rows[{field: value, ...}]

stat-row.description: Simple key-value row for settings/config display

rectangle.description: Simple styled rectangle with optional value/label

feature-weight.description: Feature importance indicator with progress bar and dot
feature-weight.fields: key (label), value, percentage, bg_color (color name: orange|yellow|red|green|purple)

color_presets: blue-gradient - Blue gradient background for header sections
white-10 - Semi-transparent white with blur (for overlay on gradient)
text-white, text-gray-900, text-gray-800, text-gray-700, text-blue-200 - Text colors
Or use any Tailwind CSS class directly
_schema.example: See RichDashboardExample.json for a full end-to-end example using tabs, charts, KPI cards, tables, and status indicators
